stemHtml: Which of these statements about a gust lock systems is correct?

options.a: On reversible flight controls, there is no need for a gust lock.
options.b: On some aeroplanes, take-off is prevented with a gust lock engaged.
options.c: A gust lock is only fitted on the elevator and the rudder.
options.d: A gust lock can be used in flight to reduce the effect of turbulence.
